zh.Felton, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德費爾頓
zh.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh.Whitwick, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾特維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Beaumont於1310年8月15日出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，她的父親Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris40歲，母親Alice Comyn21歲。她於大約1329年與David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1368年11月11日在蘇格蘭享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Beaumont于1310年8月15日出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，她的父亲Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris40岁，母亲Alice Comyn21岁。她于大约1329年与David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1368年11月11日在苏格兰享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Beaumont was born on 15 August 1310, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, was 40 and her mother, Alice Comyn, was 21. She married David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl about 1329, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 11 November 1368, in Scotland, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Beaumont est née le 15 août 1310, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Alice Comyn, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl environ 1329, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 11 novembre 1368, à Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Beaumont am 15. August 1310 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris 40 und ihre Mutter Alice Comyn 21. Sie hat um 1329 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 11. November 1368 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Beaumont è nata il il 15 agosto 1310 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Alice Comyn, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl circa 1329, nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 11 novembre 1368, nel Scotland, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Beaumontが1310年8月15日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxorisは40歳，母Alice Comynは21歳であった。約1329年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンでDavid III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Athollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1368年11月11日にスコットランドで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Beaumont(이)가 1310년 8월 15일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Comyn(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1329년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 11월 11일 스컷랜드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.15 August 1310–11 November 1368: 1310 оны Наймдугаар сарын 15–1368 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 11

pt.15 August 1310–11 November 1368: 15 de agosto de 1310–11 de novembro de 1368
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Beaumont nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1310, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Alice Comyn, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl aproximadamente 1329, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1368, em Scotland, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Beaumont родилась 15 августа 1310 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Comyn, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl около 1329 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 11 ноября 1368 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.15 August 1310–11 November 1368: 15 de agosto de 1310–11 de noviembre de 1368
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine de Beaumont nació el 15 de agosto de 1310, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Alice Comyn, tenía 21 años. Se casó con David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl aproximadamente 1329, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1368, en Scotland, a la edad de 58 años.
